title: Lorde Marks ‘Virgin’ Anniversary With 49 ‘Xrays’ Demos From the Album
summary: Singer also opens up about her personal battles while making the 2025 LP in a newsletter to fans: "Living in these songs had an incantatory effect. I felt myself change”

title: Justin Bieber Announces Number 1 Pick for Hometown Maple Leafs at 2026 NHL Draft
summary: Gavin McKenna, a native of Whitehorse, Yukon, walked up to Bieber's song "Yukon"

title: Quavo Gets Everything He Wants on Pharrell Williams-Produced Single ‘Haavin’
summary: The track previously premiered at Louis Vuitton’s Menswear Spring-Summer 2027 show is the first glimpse into Quavo’s upcoming album project executive produced by Williams

title: Tom Hardy Is Crossing Over to Music With a [Checks Notes] Rap Album
summary: The English actor will embody his Frankie Pulitzer persona again for a collaboration LP with hip-hop supergroup Czarface

title: Noah Kahan Asks Fans to Stop Stealing Hometown Road Sign: ‘Total Disrespect’
summary: Fans have been “repeatedly” removing Alger Brook Road sign after the singer mentioned it in “The View Between Villages”

title: Cara Delevingne Wrote New Single ‘Need It’ Over Text With Fiona Apple
summary: The song will appear on the upcoming debut album from Delevingne scheduled for release later this summer
